plugins.name: ralph
plugins.description: RALPH v2 - Single /ralph command for autonomous coding loops with guided planning. Detects state, routes to the right phase.

plugins.name: create-markdown-plan
plugins.description: Create structured Markdown project plans with phases, tasks, ownership, and acceptance criteria

plugins.name: notify-telegram
plugins.description: Send one-way notification messages to yourself via Telegram Bot API

plugins.name: notify-webhook
plugins.description: Send notifications via a PHP relay to Teams, Telegram, Slack, Discord, ntfy, or Email

plugins.name: present-as-html
plugins.description: Generate beautiful, self-contained HTML documents with sidebar navigation, Mermaid diagrams, resizable panels, and fullscreen zoom from any analysis or report content

plugins.name: hevy-api
plugins.description: Interact with the Hevy workout platform API via curl/bash. Covers auth setup, workouts, exercises, routines, and pagination.

plugins.name: claude-viz
plugins.description: Live visualization side-panel for Claude Code. Push Mermaid diagrams, Kroki-rendered diagrams (GraphViz, PlantUML, C4, D2, DBML, etc.), HTML, and SVG to a browser tab in real-time as you chat.

plugins.name: mararn1618-ticktick-handoff
plugins.description: Process tasks tagged with 'ai', 'handoff', or 'delegate' from any TickTick project, track status via Kanban columns in the Handoff project, and notify via Telegram

plugins.name: mararn1618-home-assistant
plugins.description: Personal Home Assistant setup profile: connection details, room layout, devices, integrations, and session workflow

plugins.name: markdown-to-everywhere
plugins.description: Markdown to Everywhere: author markdown with status badges, two-column layouts, and draw.io diagrams, then render to self-contained HTML or publish to Confluence Cloud with status macros, draw.io embeds, and layout sections

plugins.name: mararn1618-kleinanzeigen
plugins.description: Create optimized kleinanzeigen.de listings from photos and a brief description. Researches the product via Vision and web search, builds a validated pricing strategy, selects and sorts photos, and generates a ready-to-post German listing using Generator/Adversary agent teams.

plugins.name: mararn1618-workstreams
plugins.description: Turn any folder into a stateless, resumable Claude workspace: per-topic workstream folders with worklog, decisions, dated inputs, and a self-maintained CLAUDE.md index. Kill the session anytime, resume from disk.

plugins.name: discuss-plan-implement
plugins.description: Minimal discuss -> plan -> implement workflow for one story at a time. Phase C uses Claude Code Teams for parallel implementers and a clean-context advisor/fixer GAN verification loop.

plugins.name: notes-like-markus
plugins.description: Voice reference for agent-produced notes. Writes fleeting notes, meeting alignments, ticket scratchpads, and daily summaries in a terse human voice instead of verbose AI prose.

plugins.name: agent-kb
plugins.description: Build agent-first knowledge bases from free-form sources. Scans paths in parallel, clusters into numbered domain folders, writes curated prose-first articles, generates CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md routing files, and scrubs for sensitive data.
